description: {"description": "Leaf is broadly ovate with serrated margins. Surface appears pubescent (hairy). Venation is palmate."} {"description": "Multiple, small (1-5mm diameter) lesions are present. Lesions are dark brown to black, slightly raised, and appear somewhat angular or irregular in shape. Some lesions exhibit a reddish-purple halo. Possible presence of sporulation within lesions."} Lesions are scattered across the leaf surface, with a higher concentration towards the distal portion. No apparent pattern of distribution (random).
